compositional_deconstruction.background: warm off-white residential surface with a faint room-plan grid and soft depth of field; leave clean negative space around the edges for article cropping

elements.desc: USB radio sticks and a compact local hub arranged as a practical home automation bench

protocol devices grouped cleanly by role without drawn connection lines, logos, or labels, a local mini PC hub with soft activity light and abstract AI routing lines, voice waveform shapes as ambient light, no words or UI copy
subtle visual metaphor for Nanoleaf Matter & Thread reliability: compact local hardware, status lights, and organized setup, with no readable text and no line overlay

high_level_description: Landscape editorial cover image for a TaraHome technical blog guide: Can You Use Nanoleaf Matter and Thread Lights With Home Assistant Without Apple Home?. Show the specific smart-home topic as real hardware and a local-first system, not a generic stock image. No text, no logos, no brand names, no screenshots, no readable UI, no decorative routing-line overlay, no translucent panels, no inset frames, no floating UI cards, no progress bars.
negative_prompt: words, letters, numbers, captions, logos, watermarks, fake UI text, brand labels, distorted screens, hands, people, messy cables, generic stock photo, purple gradient background, routing line overlay, network line overlay, glowing connection trails over the photo, translucent UI panels, inset frame overlay, floating cards over a room photo, progress bar

style_description.aesthetics: premium practical smart-home editorial, warm residential technology, local-first, trustworthy, clean product photography with restrained Tara visual language
style_description.art_style: high-end technology still life, restrained, detailed, useful, no sci-fi clutter
style_description.lighting: soft natural window light with subtle Tara green status glows, realistic shadows, high clarity
